summary: Iteration 61 testing completed. All 12 features tested for Edit/Delete functionality in Sales Return and Stock Issue tabs. Backend: 6/6 tests passed (4 skipped due to fixture dependencies). Frontend: All features verified working.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: Sales Return tab correctly shows history table with edit/delete action buttons
Stock Issue tab correctly shows history table with edit/delete action buttons
Edit dialogs for both Sales Return and Stock Issue have all required fields
Sales Return edit dialog includes: Quantity, Rate, GST%, Date, Customer Name, Customer Phone, Notes, and amount preview
Stock Issue edit dialog includes: Quantity, Date, Reason (dropdown), Notes
PUT /api/stock/transaction/{id} correctly updates transactions and recalculates amounts for sales returns
Purchase tab edit/delete buttons are visible but missing data-testid attributes (minor)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit/Delete functionality for Sales Return and Stock Issue tabs is fully working. All 8 tabs visible in Items & Inventory page. Backend APIs PUT/DELETE /api/stock/transaction/{id} working correctly.
